summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Best Western Imperio admin panel. All major features working correctly including authentication, dashboard analytics, room management, floor layout, booking management, and settings. Backend APIs functional with 90% success rate. Frontend-backend integration excellent.

minor_issues.issue: Lockout mechanism not triggered in test (may be timing related)
Returns 200 instead of expected 201 for creation

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@bwimperio.com / bwimperio)
Dashboard shows analytics cards (Total Rooms: 31, Available: 16, Booked: 9, Maintenance: 6)
Room Management page lists 31 rooms in table view
Room Management - Add Room button opens modal
Floor Layout shows 3 floor tabs with room grid and status dropdowns
Floor Layout - change room status via dropdown
Booking Management page loads and functions
Settings page loads with hotel details
Settings page - Save button updates settings
Public /api/rooms returns room data from MongoDB
Public /api/floors returns floor data from MongoDB
POST /api/auth/login returns token and sets cookies
GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid session
